{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323192437D8A8C531805C1D7441DB"}"},"total":706},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7582998092676121369","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"虽远离于历史过程，但却以仿古文笔描写出了穿越者勇敢面对外族侵略、大汉民族不畏艰难、誓死抵抗的勇气与胆魄。不失为一好作品！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765558154,"group_id":"7553976976856321049","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"大学教授，教书育人，为国选才","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8F619FDKwSMKxUryMAVQjY=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1aeba02edad34327b41fb26dd68a47aa~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789824&x-signature=HxBaK%2BPl8DpV608ndZgyKx6JTZY%3D","user_id":"59174685180","user_name":"天山上的北极熊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"59174685180","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1670351793,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7553976976856321049","book_info":{"abstract":"（无系统，不无脑）现代历史系研究生，魂穿昏君宋高宗。
自此，一位内心跳脱、手段奇特的皇帝横空出世。
既然史书由胜利者书写，那便刀锋扬起，先斩奸佞头颅；皇权重塑，重用擎天忠良。
他本想做个快活帝王，却一不小心活成了敌人最恐惧的模样。
当金国使者在殿前化为肉泥，当大宋龙旗插上漠北王帐。
这天下，终究是大宋的天下。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6799f082d420efde964c3d5501cc4585","author":"甩了甩了","author_id":"","book_id":"7553976976856321049","book_name":"野官家","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":498,"name":"皇帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=498&name=皇帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":501,"name":"宋朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=501&name=宋朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7554336824609473049","read_count":"15691","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"686220"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"306","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,皇帝,宋朝,争霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4e146fccb3a7a3960ee40d467c4338f3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779449077&x-signature=spQQrAKh%2B9P2MCW2xAZNBMo8zv4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1179121305257036","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"23"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323192437D8A8C531805C1D7441DB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_b
